welcome.hook: The family mental load is exhausting.

painPoints.title: What's your biggest headache?
painPoints.subtitle: Select what takes up most of your time daily
painPoints.hint: Multiple selection — your choices will personalize the app

solution.title: Family Flow handles it
solution.subtitle: Here's what we'll set up for you:

meals.title: Automatic meal planning
meals.desc: 7 days of balanced meals, ready to go

chores.title: Chores split fairly
chores.desc: Every day, everyone knows what to do

groceries.title: Centralized shopping list
groceries.desc: No more 3 apps — everything in one place

mascot.title: A tree that grows with you
mascot.subtitle: Every completed task helps your family tree grow. Unlock decorations, inhabitants, and experience interactive story adventures together.

features.grow: Watch it evolve from seed to legendary tree
features.sagas: Interactive stories to follow as a family
features.rewards: Earn leaves to customize your garden

grandparents.chatIdHelper: Create a bot via @BotFather, add it to the group, then get the chat ID via the getUpdates API.
grandparents.shareSheetHelper: When sharing, the share sheet will open and you can choose the {{channel}} group or desired contact.

Existing files will not be overwritten.

vacation.endAfterStart: End date must be after start date.
vacation.endInFuture: End date must be today or later.
vacation.activatedMessage: Head to the Tasks tab to see your checklist.
vacation.deactivateMessage: Normal tasks will be restored. The vacation checklist will be kept.

telegram.missingParamsMsg: Enter the token and chat ID first.
telegram.testFailMsg: Unable to send message. Check the token and chat ID.

telegram.step2Line1: 1. On Telegram, open the conversation with your bot
telegram.step2Line3: 3. Open this URL in a browser:

zen.description: When all conditions are met, the dashboard shows a calm space with a breathing circle and a preview of tomorrow.
zen.sectionsDescription: These sections must be completed or empty to reach zen state.

ai.description: Enable an AI assistant for personalized suggestions and conversational search. Your data stays on your device — only an anonymized summary is sent.
ai.deleteMessage: The AI assistant will be disabled.
ai.keyModalDesc: Paste your Anthropic API key. It will be securely stored on your device.
ai.savedMsg: API key saved. The AI assistant is now active.

gamification.resetMessage: All points, levels, streaks, and loot boxes will be reset to zero. This action is irreversible.

vault.compatHint: Data is stored in standard .md files, compatible with Obsidian.
vault.syncHint: Multi-device sync: place the vault in a Google Drive or Dropbox folder synced locally on each phone.
vault.replayMessage: The app will return to the welcome screen to redo the initial setup. Your data will not be deleted.
vault.deleteWarning: Deletes local preferences (API keys, PIN, settings) and unlinks the vault. Your Markdown files are not affected.
vault.deleteMessage:
This will unlink the vault from the app and erase local preferences (API keys, PIN, settings).

Your Markdown files in the vault will not be deleted.
vault.deletedMsg: Restart the app to complete the reset.

notifications.localHint: iOS notifications based on your data. Work even when the app is closed.
notifications.coursesDetail: Every day at {{hour}}:{{minute}} if stock is low
notifications.defiDetail: Notification when a challenge is launched by another member
notifications.weeklyAIDetail: Sunday at {{hour}}:{{minute}} · Telegram · API key required

automations.description: The automatic flow connects your recipes, shopping, and stock. Disable individual steps if needed.

automations.shoppingToStockDetail: Update stock when a food item is checked off the shopping list
automations.cookedToStockDetail: Decrease stock when a meal is marked as cooked

calendarImporter.noEventsDesc: No birthday events found. Make sure your events contain "Birthday" in the title, or that the native Birthdays calendar is enabled.

helpModal.title: Guide
helpModal.itemA11y: {{name}} — {{description}}. Tap to view and replay tips.

stages.graineDesc: A tiny seed full of promise…
stages.pousseDesc: The first leaves are reaching for the sky!
stages.arbusteDesc: A lovely bushy shrub taking shape.
stages.arbreDesc: A strong tree with beautiful branches.
stages.majestueuxDesc: A magnificent tree with flowers and birds!
stages.legendaireDesc: A golden, luminous tree. The legend is born.

species.cerisierDesc: Elegant and delicate, the cherry tree blooms with beautiful pink flowers. A symbol of renewal and fleeting beauty.
species.cheneDesc: Robust and majestic, the oak symbolizes strength and longevity. Its acorns nourish the entire ecosystem.
species.bambouDesc: Zen and slender, bamboo grows fast and stays evergreen. A symbol of flexibility and resilience.
species.orangerDesc: Colorful and generous, the orange tree offers juicy, fragrant fruits. A symbol of joy and abundance.
species.palmierDesc: Exotic and fun, the palm tree evokes vacation and adventure. A symbol of freedom and relaxation.

picker.title: Choose your tree
picker.subtitle: Each species has its own unique character. You can change later!

placement.choose_enfant: Where do you want to put it?

deco.balancoire_desc: A wooden swing hanging from a branch. Kids love swinging in the breeze!
deco.cabane_desc: A cozy little treehouse nestled in the branches. The perfect hideout for adventurers.
deco.guirlandes_desc: Fairy lights that illuminate the tree at night. Guaranteed magical atmosphere!
deco.lanterne_desc: A traditional lantern casting a warm glow between the branches.
deco.nid_desc: A carefully woven cozy nest. Maybe a bird family will move in?
deco.hamac_desc: A colorful hammock strung between two branches. Perfect for naps or reading!
deco.fontaine_desc: An enchanted fountain at the tree's base. Its gentle murmur soothes all who listen.
deco.couronne_desc: The royal crown atop the tree. Only the most devoted can obtain it!
deco.portail_desc: A shimmering dimensional portal at the base of the tree. Where does it lead? A mystery…
deco.cristal_desc: A pure, luminous crystal at the very top of the tree. It captures starlight and illuminates the entire garden.
deco.lanterneArgent_desc: A lantern forged by a mysterious traveler. Its silver light never goes out.
deco.masqueOmbre_desc: A mask from the Shadow Carnival. It shimmers between light and darkness.
deco.botteFoin_desc: A golden hay bale on the ground. It gives the garden a warm farmhouse feel.
deco.etalFruits_desc: A lovely wooden stand filled with fresh fruits. Garden visitors love it!

hab.oiseau_desc: A melodious little bird that sings at sunrise. Its presence brightens the whole garden.
hab.ecureuil_desc: A playful squirrel that hides nuts everywhere. Loves climbing up and down the trunk!
hab.papillons_desc: A swarm of colorful butterflies dancing around the flowers. Gorgeous in spring!
hab.coccinelle_desc: A lucky ladybug strolling on the leaves. Brings good fortune and cheer.
hab.chat_desc: A purring cat napping on a branch. Watches over the garden with one lazy eye.
hab.hibou_desc: A wise owl that watches over the tree at night. They say it whispers advice to the stars.
hab.fee_desc: A glittering fairy who protects the tree with magic. Leaves a trail of stardust behind.
hab.dragon_desc: A majestic dragon who chose this tree as its domain. Its mere presence inspires awe.
hab.phoenix_desc: An eternal firebird reborn from its ashes. Its warmth protects the tree even in winter.
hab.licorne_desc: A luminous unicorn with a starlit coat. Its horn shines with a light that heals and inspires.
hab.espritEau_desc: An aquatic spirit born from a hidden spring. It makes droplets dance around the tree.
hab.ancienGardien_desc: A millennial guardian awakened by an ancestral seed. It silently watches over the garden.
hab.poussin_desc: A tiny yellow chick pecking happily at the ground. It follows the bigger ones everywhere!
hab.poulet_desc: A proud chicken strutting around the garden. It clucks at every good news.
hab.canard_desc: A colorful duck waddling between the flowers. It loves rainy days!
hab.cochon_desc: A little pink pig grunting with joy. It digs the soil looking for truffles.
hab.vache_desc: A peaceful cow grazing at the foot of the tree. Its presence brings calm and serenity.

shop.title: Tree Shop
shop.buySuccess: {{item}} purchased! It now appears on your tree.
shop.buySuccess_enfant: YEAH! {{item}} bought! Check out your tree!!
shop.emptyDeco: No decorations available at your current stage.
shop.emptyHab: No inhabitants available at your current stage.

tresor_ecureuil.title: A squirrel hid a treasure!
tresor_ecureuil.title_enfant: OMG! A squirrel hid a TREASURE!!
tresor_ecureuil.desc: A cheeky little squirrel buried something at the foot of your tree…
tresor_ecureuil.desc_enfant: A super cute squirrel hid something at the foot of your tree! What is it?!
tresor_ecureuil.resultA: You dug up a shiny pebble! The squirrel looks at you proudly.
tresor_ecureuil.resultB: The squirrel winks at you and scurries up the branches!

tempete.title: A storm is coming!
tempete.desc: The wind is blowing hard and the branches are shaking. Your tree needs help!
tempete.desc_enfant: WHOOOOSH! The wind is super strong! Your tree is shaking, quick help it!
tempete.resultA: You bravely protected your tree! Not a single leaf was lost.
tempete.resultB: The tree held strong on its own. It's tougher than it looks!

voyageur.title: A mysterious traveler
voyageur.desc: A strange character stops by your tree and asks for shelter…
voyageur.resultA: The traveler thanked you with a mysterious gift. How generous!
voyageur.resultB: They smiled and continued on their way, whistling a tune.

lucioles.title: Fireflies are dancing!
lucioles.desc: Tonight, dozens of fireflies light up your tree with a thousand glows.
lucioles.resultA: You spent a magical moment watching them dance.
lucioles.resultB: Great photo! The fireflies posed just for you.

graine_magique.title: A seed falls from the sky!
graine_magique.title_enfant: WOW! A MAGIC seed fell from the sky!!
graine_magique.desc: A glowing seed gently lands at the foot of your tree. It shines!
graine_magique.desc_enfant: A super shiny seed fell from the sky! It's glowing so bright, it's MAGIC!
graine_magique.resultA: The seed glows in the soil… something will sprout soon!
graine_magique.resultB: You keep the seed in your pocket. It keeps sparkling.

arc_en_ciel.title: A rainbow appears!
arc_en_ciel.desc: After the rain, a beautiful rainbow arches over your tree.
arc_en_ciel.resultA: Your drawing is beautiful! The colors are perfect.
arc_en_ciel.resultB: Your wish flies up to the sky… who knows if it'll come true?

hibou_sage.title: The wise owl whispers
hibou_sage.desc: An old owl has landed on a branch and seems to want to tell you something…
hibou_sage.resultA: The owl shared a forest secret. You feel wiser!
hibou_sage.resultB: The owl loved the cookie! It'll hoot for you tonight.

tresor_pirate.title: A treasure map!
tresor_pirate.desc: You find an old map stuck between the roots. An X marks a spot…
tresor_pirate.desc_enfant: You found a pirate map hidden in the roots!! There's an X on it, it must be treasure!
tresor_pirate.resultA: You found a chest full of golden coins (chocolate ones)!
tresor_pirate.resultB: The map reveals a secret message: 'The adventure is the real treasure.'

fee_egaree.title: A lost fairy
fee_egaree.desc: A tiny sparkling fairy seems lost near your tree.
fee_egaree.resultA: The fairy found her way! She left you some stardust.
fee_egaree.resultB: The fairy fell peacefully asleep. Tomorrow she'll continue her journey.

pluie_etoiles.title: Shooting star shower!
pluie_etoiles.desc: The sky lights up with shooting stars above your tree. Magical!
pluie_etoiles.desc_enfant: The sky is FULL of shooting stars! It's sooo beautiful above your tree!
pluie_etoiles.resultA: Your wish rises to the stars… a shiver of magic runs through you.
pluie_etoiles.resultB: You collected sparkling stardust! So precious.

papillon_geant.title: A giant butterfly!
papillon_geant.desc: A butterfly with iridescent wings, as big as your hand, lands on your tree.
papillon_geant.resultA: Its wings are soft as silk. It flutters happily!
papillon_geant.resultB: Its colors shift under your amazed gaze. Stunning.

concert_oiseaux.title: Morning concert!
concert_oiseaux.desc: All the garden birds have gathered for a concert in your tree.
concert_oiseaux.resultA: The melody filled you with joy. What a beautiful way to start the day!
concert_oiseaux.resultB: You dance to the songs! Even the birds seem to applaud.

neige_magique.title: Magic snow!
neige_magique.desc: Sparkling snowflakes fall on your tree, even though it's not winter…
neige_magique.resultA: The world's tiniest snowman! It smiles at you.
neige_magique.resultB: Mmm… hot chocolate under magic snow, pure bliss.

champignon_dore.title: A golden mushroom!
champignon_dore.desc: A glowing mushroom sprouted at the foot of your tree overnight.
champignon_dore.resultA: You picked it! It still glows in your hand. Edible? A mystery…
champignon_dore.resultB: Fascinating! You discovered it's a very rare species.

lettre_mysterieuse.title: A mysterious letter
lettre_mysterieuse.desc: A wax-sealed envelope hangs from a branch of your tree.
lettre_mysterieuse.resultA: The letter reads: 'Those who care for their tree care for the world.'
lettre_mysterieuse.resultB: You keep the mystery intact. Maybe one day you'll open it…

voyageur_argent.title: The Silver Traveler
voyageur_argent.desc: A hooded traveler approaches your tree…
voyageur_argent.desc_enfant: A super mysterious traveler is coming to your tree!!

ch1.narrative: A traveler in a silver cloak stops at the foot of your tree. He seems exhausted from a long journey and sets down his bag with a sigh.
ch1.narrative_enfant: A man with a silver cape sits down by your tree. He looks super tired!
ch1.cliffhanger: The traveler looks at you with a mysterious smile… 'Thank you. See you tomorrow.'
ch1.cliffhanger_enfant: The traveler smiles… 'Thanks! See you tomorrow, I promise!'

ch2.narrative: The traveler is still here this morning. He pulls a shiny object from his satchel and shows it to you.
ch2.narrative_enfant: The traveler is back! He pulls something shiny from his bag!
ch2.narrative_generosity: The traveler made you warm tea to thank you for your hospitality. He then pulls a shiny object from his satchel.
ch2.narrative_curiosity: The traveler is impressed by your curiosity. He pulls a shiny object from his satchel saying: 'You deserve to see this.'
ch2.cliffhanger: The object pulses with a soft glow. The traveler whispers: 'Tomorrow, I'll show you what it does…'
ch2.cliffhanger_enfant: The object glows brighter and brighter! 'Tomorrow, you'll see what it does…'

ch3.narrative: The traveler reveals the object is an ancient key. It opens a secret passage in the forest, but the path is guarded.
ch3.narrative_enfant: It's a MAGIC KEY! It opens a secret passage in the forest! But there's a guardian…
ch3.narrative_sagesse: Thanks to your wisdom, the traveler shares a second clue: the guardian can be reasoned with.
ch3.narrative_courage: Your courage impresses the traveler. He tells you the guardian respects those who show no fear.
ch3.choiceC: Offer a gift to the guardian
ch3.cliffhanger: The guardian watches you… The final decision draws near.
ch3.cliffhanger_enfant: The guardian is watching you… What's gonna happen tomorrow?!

ch4.narrative: The passage opens. The traveler lowers his hood, revealing his true face: he is an ancient forest guardian, come to test your heart.
ch4.narrative_enfant: The passage opens! And the traveler takes off his hood — he's a magical forest guardian! He wanted to see if you have a good heart!
ch4.narrative_courage: The guardian recognizes your courage. 'You never backed down. The forest needs protectors like you.'
ch4.narrative_sagesse: The guardian admires your wisdom. 'You chose the path of reason. The forest is in good hands.'
ch4.narrative_generosity: The guardian is moved by your generosity. 'You gave without counting. The forest will repay you tenfold.'
ch4.choiceA: Walk with him into the forest
ch4.cliffhanger: The traveler smiles one last time.
ch4.cliffhanger_enfant: The traveler gives you a BIG smile!

finale.generosity: The traveler hands you his silver lantern. 'Your generosity lit my path. May this lantern light yours.'
finale.generosity_enfant: The traveler gives you his AWESOME lantern! 'You were so kind, this lantern is for you!'
finale.sagesse: The traveler entrusts you with his silver lantern. 'Your wisdom surpasses your age. This light will always guide you.'
finale.sagesse_enfant: The traveler gives you his lantern! 'You're so smart, it's yours!'
finale.courage: The traveler offers you his silver lantern. 'Your courage commands respect. May this flame never go out.'
finale.courage_enfant: The traveler gives you his lantern! 'You were super brave, well done!!'
finale.curiosity: The traveler leaves you his silver lantern. 'Your curiosity is a treasure. This lantern will illuminate your discoveries.'
finale.curiosity_enfant: The traveler gives you his lantern! 'You're so curious, I love it! It's yours!'

source_cachee.title: The Hidden Spring
source_cachee.desc: Your tree's roots discovered something underground…
source_cachee.desc_enfant: Your tree's roots found SOMETHING underground!!

ch1.narrative: Digging near the roots, you hear a gurgling sound. There's water flowing somewhere below!
ch1.narrative_enfant: You hear a weird noise under the roots… There's water down there! SO COOL!
ch1.cliffhanger: The water seems to sing softly beneath your feet… Tomorrow, you'll know.
ch1.cliffhanger_enfant: The water makes funny sounds under your feet… Tomorrow you'll find out what it is!

ch2.narrative: You've discovered a crystal-clear spring with strange powers. The plants around it grow twice as fast!
ch2.narrative_enfant: You found a MAGIC spring! Plants around it grow SUPER fast!!
ch2.narrative_curiosity: Your curiosity paid off! The spring reveals rainbow reflections when you look closely.
ch2.narrative_sagesse: Thanks to your patient observation, you notice the spring pulses with the rhythm of the seasons.
ch2.choiceA: Share the water with the garden
ch2.cliffhanger: The spring glows blue at dusk… it still hides secrets.
ch2.cliffhanger_enfant: The spring glows blue at night! It still has secrets!!

ch3.narrative: A small luminous being emerges from the spring. It's a water spirit, guardian of this spring for centuries.
ch3.narrative_enfant: A little water person comes out of the spring!! It's a WATER SPIRIT!!
ch3.narrative_generosity: The water spirit thanks you for sharing its water. It trusts you.
ch3.narrative_curiosity: The water spirit is impressed by your discoveries. It wants to show you its world.
ch3.cliffhanger_enfant: The water spirit dances everywhere, it's so beautiful!

finale.generosity: The water spirit decides to stay near your tree forever. 'You shared the water of life. I'll share my magic with you.'
finale.generosity_enfant: The water spirit wants to stay with you! 'You shared the water, I'll share my magic!'
finale.curiosity: The water spirit is fascinated by your thirst for knowledge. 'An explorer like you deserves a companion. I'm staying!'
finale.curiosity_enfant: The water spirit loves you! 'You're so curious, I'm staying with you!'
finale.sagesse: The water spirit admires your patience. 'You understood the rhythm of water. We shall be friends.'
finale.sagesse_enfant: The water spirit says: 'You're so patient, I like you! I'm staying!'

carnaval_ombres.title: The Shadow Carnival
carnaval_ombres.desc: When night falls, silhouettes dance around your tree…
carnaval_ombres.desc_enfant: At night, shadows DANCE around your tree!! So mysterious!

ch1.narrative: At midnight, shadow creatures appear around your tree. They hang lanterns and music fills the air. It's a carnival!
ch1.narrative_enfant: At midnight, shadow creatures show up! They put up lanterns and music! It's a CARNIVAL!!
ch1.cliffhanger: The shadow queen has noticed you. She slowly approaches…
ch1.cliffhanger_enfant: The shadow queen saw you! She's coming your way…

ch2.narrative: The shadow queen proposes a challenge: complete three carnival trials to win a legendary prize.
ch2.narrative_enfant: The shadow queen says: 'Wanna play my 3 trials? There's a LEGENDARY PRIZE to win!'
ch2.narrative_courage: The shadow queen bows to you with respect. 'A brave heart! My trials shall be worthy of you.'
ch2.narrative_sagesse: The shadow queen observes you with interest. 'A sharp mind! My trials shall be subtle.'
ch2.cliffhanger: First trial passed. Two more to go… The carnival is in full swing.
ch2.cliffhanger_enfant: First trial PASSED!! Two more to go… The carnival continues!!

ch3.narrative: The second trial takes you to the heart of the carnival. Shadows swirl and the music grows intense.
ch3.narrative_enfant: Second trial! Shadows are spinning and the music is SO LOUD!!
ch3.narrative_malice: The shadows appreciate your cunning. They show you secret shortcuts through the carnival.
ch3.narrative_courage: The shadows admire your boldness. The crowd parts to let you through.
ch3.cliffhanger: The final trial will be the hardest. The queen is preparing something…
ch3.cliffhanger_enfant: The final trial is coming!! The queen is preparing something BIG…

ch4.narrative: The final trial: the shadow queen presents a mask. 'Whoever wears this mask sees the truth. Are you ready?'
ch4.narrative_enfant: The final trial!! The queen shows you a mask: 'Whoever puts it on sees the TRUTH! Are you ready?'
ch4.narrative_courage: The queen hands you the mask with admiration. 'You fear nothing. Show me you're worthy of truth.'
ch4.narrative_sagesse: The queen presents the mask with respect. 'Your wisdom prepares you to see what others cannot.'
ch4.narrative_malice: The queen laughs softly. 'You're as clever as my shadows. This mask was made for you.'
ch4.choiceA: Put on the mask at sunrise
ch4.choiceB: Put on the mask by moonlight
ch4.cliffhanger: The mask reveals an invisible world…
ch4.cliffhanger_enfant: The mask shows an INVISIBLE WORLD!!

finale.courage: The shadow mask chooses you. The queen declares: 'You have the courage to face the truth. This mask is now yours.'
finale.courage_enfant: The mask picks you!! The queen says: 'You're SO brave, the mask is yours!'
finale.sagesse: The shadow mask recognizes your wisdom. The queen smiles: 'You understand the balance of light and shadow. Keep it well.'
finale.sagesse_enfant: The mask knows you're super wise! The queen: 'You understand everything, it's yours!'
finale.malice: The shadow mask resonates with your cunning. The queen laughs: 'A worthy carnival heir! This mask belongs to you.'
finale.malice_enfant: The mask loves your cunning! The queen laughs: 'You're a true carnival champion! It's yours!'

graine_anciens.title: The Seed of the Ancients
graine_anciens.desc: A millennial seed was discovered beneath your tree's roots…
graine_anciens.desc_enfant: A SUPER ANCIENT SEED was found under the roots!!

ch1.narrative: While tending the soil around your tree, you discover an extraordinary seed. It's golden and vibrates gently, like a beating heart.
ch1.narrative_enfant: You find a GOLDEN seed underground! It vibrates like a tiny heart! SO WEIRD!
ch1.cliffhanger: The seed pulses with warm light in your hand… Something is about to happen.
ch1.cliffhanger_enfant: The seed glows in your hand! Something is gonna HAPPEN!!

ch2.narrative: The seed sprouted overnight. A golden shoot emerges, growing before your eyes!
ch2.narrative_enfant: The seed SPROUTED overnight!! A GOLDEN shoot is growing super fast!!
ch2.narrative_sagesse: Your patience was rewarded. The shoot is vigorous and radiates a soothing light.
ch2.narrative_curiosity: Your observations revealed that the shoot reacts to sounds. It dances when you talk to it!
ch2.cliffhanger: The shoot grows and luminous runes appear on its leaves…
ch2.cliffhanger_enfant: The shoot grows and GLOWING SYMBOLS appear on the leaves!!

ch3.narrative: The runes on the leaves tell an ancient story. This seed is the last of a mythical tree that once protected the entire forest.
ch3.narrative_enfant: The symbols on the leaves tell a story! This seed comes from a LEGENDARY TREE that protected the whole forest!
ch3.narrative_generosity: The plant seems to respond to your generosity. Its roots intertwine with your tree's, strengthening it.
ch3.narrative_sagesse: Thanks to your research, you understand the plant needs an emotional bond to fully flourish.
ch3.choiceB: Let it bask in the sun
ch3.cliffhanger: The plant begins to glow with intense golden light. It's transforming…
ch3.cliffhanger_enfant: The plant glows brighter and brighter!! It's TRANSFORMING!!

ch4.narrative: The plant takes a humanoid form. An ancient, kind face appears in the foliage. It's the Ancient Guardian, spirit of the mythical tree.
ch4.narrative_enfant: The plant becomes a PERSON!! A face appears in the leaves! It's the Ancient Guardian, spirit of the old legendary tree!!
ch4.narrative_courage: The Guardian opens his eyes and tells you: 'Your courage hastened my awakening. You are worthy.'
ch4.narrative_sagesse: The Guardian awakens slowly and whispers: 'Your wisdom nourished me. You are ready for truth.'
ch4.narrative_curiosity: The Guardian looks at you with curiosity: 'You remind me of my youth. Always seeking, never retreating.'
ch4.cliffhanger: The Ancient Guardian gazes at your tree with an unreadable expression…
ch4.cliffhanger_enfant: The Guardian looks at your tree with SUPER weird eyes…

ch5.narrative: The Ancient Guardian places his hand on your tree. The roots of both trees merge. He proposes a pact: to watch over the garden together for eternity.
ch5.narrative_enfant: The Guardian touches your tree! The roots MERGE! He wants to be your friend FOREVER and protect the garden with you!
ch5.narrative_generosity: The Guardian is moved by everything you've given. 'The roots of generosity run deepest.'
ch5.narrative_curiosity: The Guardian laughs softly. 'Your curiosity awakened memories I thought were lost.'
ch5.narrative_sagesse: The Guardian nods. 'Your wisdom transcends the ages. Together, we shall be invincible.'
ch5.cliffhanger: The Guardian smiles for the first time in millennia.
ch5.cliffhanger_enfant: The Guardian smiles! It's the first time in FOREVER!

finale.sagesse: The Ancient Guardian settles at the foot of your tree. 'Your wisdom awakened what slept. I shall be your guide and protector, as in ages past.'
finale.sagesse_enfant: The Guardian moves in! 'You're so wise, I'm staying to protect you!'
finale.generosity: The Ancient Guardian roots himself near your tree with a radiant smile. 'Your generosity revived an ancient world. I watch over you now.'
finale.generosity_enfant: The Guardian moves in! 'You're so kind, I'm staying FOREVER!'
finale.curiosity: The Ancient Guardian fully awakens. 'Your curiosity reminded me why I loved this world. Let's explore it together.'
finale.curiosity_enfant: The Guardian wakes up! 'You're so curious, I love it! Let's explore together!'
finale.courage: The Ancient Guardian stands proudly. 'Your courage reignited my flame. I shall protect this tree as you have.'
finale.courage_enfant: The Guardian stands up! 'You're so brave! Let's protect the garden together!'

farm.seedPicker_enfant: What seed do you want to plant?

crop.carrot_desc: Grows fast, great for beginners. Modest but reliable harvest.
crop.wheat_desc: The staple crop. Grows fast and pays well.
crop.tomato_desc: Takes more patience but the harvest is generous!
crop.strawberry_desc: The premium crop. Slow to grow but very profitable.
